task1.title: The types of communication training taken by employees and the reasons
task1.instruction: The chart below shows the types of communication training taken by employees in an international company and the reasons why they took part in this training. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.instruction: Some people think that governments should ban dangerous sports, while others think people should have freedom to do any sports or activity. Discuss both views and give your own opinion.
